name: Fluval Flex 9 Gallon Aquarium Kit
shortDescription: High-performance canister filter for aquariums up to 70 gallons.
description: The Fluval 307 Performance Canister Filter combines powerful filtration with whisper-quiet operation. Features an instant priming button, a multi-directional output nozzle, and a clog-proof intake strainer. Suitable for freshwater and saltwater aquariums up to 70 gallons.

reviews.title: Extremely quiet and efficient
reviews.body: Running this on my 55 gallon planted tank. Crystal clear water and nearly silent. Best filter I've owned.

name: Hikari Algae Wafers
shortDescription: Complete 20-gallon freshwater starter kit with LED hood, filter, heater, and more.
description: Everything you need to set up your first freshwater aquarium. Includes a glass tank, LED hood, Quietflow 20 power filter, 100W preset heater, fish net, thermometer, water conditioner sample, and setup guide.
features: Includes starter guide & water conditioner sample

name: Java Fern Live Aquarium Plant
shortDescription: Hardy beginner-friendly live plant — perfect for freshwater tanks.
description: Java Fern (Microsorum pteropus) is one of the most popular and hardy aquarium plants. It thrives in a wide range of conditions, requires no substrate to root, and is ideal for both beginner and expert aquascapers.

name: Seachem Prime Fresh & Saltwater Conditioner 500ml
shortDescription: The most complete and concentrated dechlorinator available for freshwater and saltwater.
description: Seachem Prime is the first and only conditioner that removes chlorine, chloramine, and ammonia. It converts ammonia into a safe, non-toxic form that is easily removed by the filter. Use with every water change.

name: Hikari Cichlid Gold Floating Pellets — Medium
shortDescription: Premium color-enhancing floating pellets for cichlids.
description: Hikari Cichlid Gold is a scientifically developed food offering your cichlid the nutrition needed for outstanding color and vigor. The unique color-enhancing formula develops brilliant coloration while promoting resistance to disease.
features: Vitamin C enriched for immune support

name: Aqueon 20 Gallon Aquarium Tank
shortDescription: Advanced planted aquarium LED with automated 24/7 sunrise/sunset cycle.
description: The Finnex Planted+ 24/7 HLC features a fully automated 24-hour light cycle with realistic sunrise, afternoon, sunset, and moonlight modes. High-output LEDs provide full-spectrum light for demanding aquatic plants.
